title: Training Sessions
details: Develop the foundations of great debating through weekly workshops focused on argumentation, speech structure, critical thinking, and confident delivery. Whether you're just starting or refining your craft, every session helps you grow.

title: Practice Debates
details: Step into realistic British Parliamentary debate rounds, tackle impromptu motions, and learn to think clearly under pressure in an environment where every debate is a chance to improve.

title: Feedback from Adjudicators
details: Receive thoughtful, constructive feedback from experienced adjudicators who help you strengthen your reasoning, sharpen your style, and discover new ways to improve after every round.

title: Research Groups
details: Explore the ideas behind the motions. Collaborate with fellow members to unpack current affairs, public policy, philosophy, economics, law, and global issues that shape today's debates.

title: Public Speaking
details: Build confidence beyond competitive debating through speeches, presentations, and impromptu speaking exercises that help you communicate with clarity in every setting.

title: Internal Tournaments
details: Put your progress to the test in friendly competitions that recreate tournament conditions, celebrate improvement, and prepare members for larger stages.

title: National Competitions
details: Represent the University of Nigeria at tournaments across Nigeria, compete alongside some of the country's finest debaters, and bring home experiences that inspire the next generation of members.
